channel.title: Maolin Sun | Trustworthy Engineering of Software Technologies (TEST) Lab

item.title: Once4All: Skeleton-Guided SMT Solver Fuzzing with LLM-Synthesized Generators
item.description:
Speaker Info:

Maolin Sun is pursuing the Ph.D. degree at School of Computer Science, Nanjing University, advised by Yuming Zhou and Yibiao Yang. He received my M.Sc. degree from Huazhong University of Science and Technology in 2023, advised by Ming Wen. His current research interests revolve around automated testing and analysis technologies for software.
